name: eight-sleep-mcp
description: Unofficial MCP server for Eight Sleep account, device, temperature, and sleep data.
long_description: Local MCP server for Eight Sleep built from observed mobile app traffic and validated against live device behavior. Supports account and device reads, temperature state, temperature events, sleep intervals, smart temperature controls, bedtime schedule updates, and Autopilot toggling.

tools.name: get_current_user
tools.description: Return the authenticated Eight Sleep account profile.

tools.name: get_device
tools.description: Return the current pod or device state.

tools.name: get_temperature
tools.description: Return current temperature settings and device state.

tools.name: turn_off_temperature
tools.description: Turn off active heating and cooling.

tools.name: set_temporary_bedtime_level
tools.description: Apply a temporary bedtime temperature change.

tools.name: set_bedtime_schedule
tools.description: Save a bedtime temperature change to the active schedule.

access_token.title: Access Token
access_token.description: Eight Sleep access token. Use this or the full credential set below.

email.title: Email
email.description: Eight Sleep account email for password-grant authentication.

password.title: Password
password.description: Eight Sleep account password for password-grant authentication.

client_id.title: Client ID
client_id.description: Eight Sleep mobile client ID from observed app traffic.

client_secret.title: Client Secret
client_secret.description: Eight Sleep mobile client secret from observed app traffic.
